turns.source_text: I think my mom is similar but I feel like I make things worse by trying to explain myself.
turns.user_message: I feel like I make things worse whenever I try to explain myself to people. It's easier to just stay quiet.
I keep worrying the people close to me would be better off without my problems. I try not to bring it up.
I've stopped reaching out when I'm struggling because I know I'm just dragging everyone down. I can see it wearing on them.
